heading: Omitted
label: 651 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, acts , ; , , which provided for the election of a Delegate to the House of Representatives of the United States to serve during each Congress, was omitted in view of the admission of Hawaii into the Union.Apr. 30, 1900, ch. 339, § 8531 Stat. 158June 28, 1906, ch. 358234 Stat. 550
